steps.name: Given User user1Name is available for team creation
And I see email verification welcome page
And I open staging backend via deep link and proceed
When I enter my email and tap next on email verification welcome page
And I start create team flow
Then I see create team page
When I enter team owner details on create team page
And I select the first organization size option
And I accept terms and anonymous usage data options
And I tap continue button on create team page
